---
title: "affine_exp"
generated: true
description: "Homogeneous affine transform from its Lie parameters."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.transform`](../nitrix-geometry-transform.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:affine_exp -->
```python
affine_exp(params: Float[Array, '... p'], *, ndim: int) -> Float[Array, '... d1 d1']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:affine_exp -->
Homogeneous affine transform from its Lie parameters.

The linear block is `matrix_exp` of the `ndim x ndim`
generator $A$ (row-major in the first $n^2$ parameters,
where $n$ is `ndim`), guaranteeing an invertible,
orientation-preserving map; the remaining `ndim` parameters are the
translation, applied directly.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:affine_exp -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `params` | `Float` | `...` × `p` | — | `(..., p)` Lie parameter vector of length $p = n^2 + n$ (12 in 3-D, 6 in 2-D): the first $n^2$ entries are the row-major generator $A$, the final `ndim` the translation. |
| `ndim` | `int` | — | — | Spatial dimensionality (2 or 3). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...` × `d1` × `d1`. Homogeneous affine matrix, `(..., ndim + 1, ndim + 1)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:affine_exp -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
| `d1` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
